name: Liberty Bus Inc
notes: Liberty Bus Inc at 1100 E Eureka St, Lima OH 45804 (also PO Box 449, Lima OH 45802; phone 419-227-6554) is NOT a school-bus operator. Historically Liberty Bus Incorporated was a mini-school-bus manufacturer (Multi Purpose Bus / MPB on GMC and Chevrolet van chassis; founded 1990s, ceased manufacturing March 2005). The current entity at this address is engaged in bus parts/maintenance/supplies (~3 employees, ~$3M annual revenue per RocketReach) and is not present in the FMCSA SAFER carrier registry under any 'Liberty Bus' name in OH. SAFER name searches for 'LIBERTY BUS' return only LIBERTY BUSCH GARDENS LLC (Tampa FL, USDOT 2594389) and LIBERTY SCHOOL BUS COMPANY INC (Orland Park IL, USDOT 540653) – neither matches. Ohio SOS business search (businesssearch.ohiosos.gov) returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch; unable to confirm Ohio entity inc_date or status directly. Likely mis-classified in the source list as a transport operator.

name: Northern Bus Lines
notes: Northern Bus Lines at 45 Dan Road Suite 125, Canton MA 02021 is confirmed as a 'school and coach bus service' per Tripadvisor listing (ranked #133 of 191 Transportation in Boston; M-F 9-5, Sat 8-2). However, FMCSA SAFER returns no carrier match for 'NORTHERN BUS LINES' in MA – only PRINCE ALBERT NORTHERN BUS LINES (Saskatchewan, USDOT 279727) and NORTHERN EXPRESS BUS SERVICE LLC (Berlin WI, USDOT 3157839, 55 PU / 48 drivers, intrastate non-HM, no rating). Neither matches Canton MA. Possible the carrier operates under a different legal name (DBA) or shares a USDOT with another entity (e.g., a Beacon Mobility family company such as North Reading Transportation / NRT Bus Inc, which serves eastern MA and Canton). Massachusetts SOS Corporations Division (sec.state.ma.us) not directly accessible via WebFetch; entity registration unverified. fmcsa_confidence=low because no carrier record could be tied to Canton MA address with the 'Northern Bus Lines' name.

name: Integrated Tech Bus Svc
notes: Address 960 King Hwy Ste 1, Kalamazoo MI 49001 corresponds to Integrated Technology Business Services LLC (ITBS, itbs.us), a Computer Related Consulting Services / IT consulting firm operating since 2007 – not a school-bus operator. FMCSA SAFER name searches for 'INTEGRATED TECH', 'INTEGRATED TECH BUS', and 'INTEGRATED TECH BUS SERVICE' return no carriers in Kalamazoo MI; closest MI match is INTEGRATED TECHNOLOGIES INTERNATIONAL LTD in Woodhaven MI (USDOT 688398, not a bus service). No record of an 'Integrated Tech Bus' school-bus contractor in Kalamazoo Public Schools (which runs its own transportation department from 1800 Ravine Road). Likely mis-classified or stale entry in the source list. Michigan LARA MiBusiness Registry not directly accessible via WebFetch to confirm.

name: Richland Center Bus Svc
notes: Address 331 Jackson St W, Battle Creek MI 49037 corresponds to Community Inclusive Recreation (CIR), a non-profit serving Battle Creek and Calhoun County – not a school-bus operator. FMCSA SAFER name searches for 'RICHLAND CENTER BUS' and 'RICHLAND BUS' return no MI matches; the four 'RICHLAND CENTER' carriers in SAFER are all in Richland Center, WI (none in MI bus services). Battle Creek's transit is operated by Battle Creek Transit / Ride Calhoun (TACC); Calhoun County schools use their own transportation department. No verifiable corporate or FMCSA record could be found for 'Richland Center Bus Service' in Battle Creek MI. Michigan LARA registry not directly accessible via WebFetch. Likely a mis-classified or defunct/listing-only entry.

name: Keller Bus Svc
notes: Only Keller Bus Service in FMCSA SAFER is the DBA of KELLER TRANSPORTATION INC, USDOT 32700, MC-119262, based at 4472 Gallant Green Rd, Waldorf MD 20601 (phone 301-843-1881) – Maryland, NOT Boise Idaho. 99 power units, 64 drivers, Satisfactory safety rating (2/6/2024), AUTHORIZED FOR Passenger, interstate. Source list's address (1125 W Amity Rd, Boise ID 83705) belongs to Norco Inc, a welding/medical/gas supplier (NPI-listed), not a bus operator. No 'Keller Bus' carrier was found in Idaho via SAFER or Idaho SDE school-transportation contractor list (which references Caldwell Transportation, Durham, etc.). Either the source mis-mapped the Maryland Keller Bus Service to an Idaho address, or there is a separate small Idaho operator not registered with FMCSA. fmcsa_confidence=low because address does not match. Idaho SOSbiz not directly fetched.
